text:
Collision (, rom. Korijon) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to be transported to the location of a previously unknown game player.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card transports the caster to the location of a player they have not met yet. It can be considered the opposite of "Magnetic Force". If all game players are registered in the user's binder, then the card is destroyed and the user remains in the same place. It can be used to find another player who the user knows to be in the game but they have yet to encounter, to explore the island, or to expand one's contact list. However, by doing so the caster runs the risk of coming across hostile players.

Fly to the location of a 'haven't met yet' player.

Trivia

The player depicted in this card's illustration recurs in "Accompany" and "Magnetic Force".
Due to Latarza's surprise at meeting Gon and Killua close to the Shiso Tree in Chapter 128, it seems that he was randomly transported to them with this card, which would make it the first spell card (and card in general outside of Eta's tutorial) to be seen by the two boys.
In Chapter 158, Killua considers using this card to meet new players in order to face Razor's pirates, although he regards it as a bad idea.
